title: bupleurum exaltatum var. linearifolium
intro: Bupleurum exaltatum var. linearifolium, also known as linear-leaved Chinese thorowax, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae. It is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine, valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating symptoms of the common cold and flu, and improving liver function. Bupleurum exaltatum var. linearifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
